notes: This registry covers all canonical FUTURE_RESEARCH external candidates from final_case_evidence/candidate_catalog.csv.
Only FREE_EXTERNAL_BENCHMARKABLE, FREE_API_BENCHMARKABLE, FREE_LOCAL_SUBSTITUTE, and INTERNAL_LOCAL_BENCHMARKABLE entries may enter benchmark ranking as executable candidates.
NEEDS_FREE_TIER_VERIFICATION and PAID_OR_TRIAL_ONLY entries remain documented but are not executable benchmark candidates.
Eligibility is never runtime promotion; promotion still requires direct output-quality lift, cost/latency/risk evidence, reproducibility, and decision-ledger approval.

entries.name: WhyLabs
entries.free_tier_evidence: Pricing/free-tier status must be verified against official terms before benchmark.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare monitoring signal quality only after no-cost terms are verified.

entries.name: BigQuery/Snowflake
entries.free_tier_evidence: Warehouse products may expose trials/free quotas, but product runtime promotion would require cloud account terms and cost guardrails.
entries.benchmark_path: Use local DuckDB/PostgreSQL proxy until direct no-cost cloud benchmark is approved.

entries.name: NVIDIA NeMo Retriever Embedding NIM
entries.free_tier_evidence: NVIDIA API Catalog exposes a developer API path, but benchmark requires NVIDIA_API_KEY and current usage terms.
entries.benchmark_path: Benchmark retrieval quality, latency, cost, and failure behavior against local sentence-transformers embeddings and Qdrant.

entries.name: NVIDIA NeMo Retriever Reranker
entries.free_tier_evidence: NVIDIA API Catalog exposes a developer API path, but benchmark requires NVIDIA_API_KEY and current usage terms.
entries.benchmark_path: Benchmark output-quality lift against deterministic reranking, source-quality ranking, and counter-evidence retrieval.

entries.name: NVIDIA reranker benchmark
entries.free_tier_evidence: Benchmark can use the same NVIDIA developer API path as the reranker candidate when API key and terms are available.
entries.benchmark_path: Run reranker quality benchmark against the existing RAG golden queries.

entries.name: NVIDIA NeMo Retriever extraction
entries.free_tier_evidence: NVIDIA API Catalog exposes a developer API path, but benchmark requires NVIDIA_API_KEY and current usage terms.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare document extraction quality against local parser baselines on fixed corpus fixtures.

entries.name: LlamaParse
entries.free_tier_evidence: Free/no-cost API usage must be verified before benchmark.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare parsing quality against Docling/PyMuPDF/local parser baselines after no-cost terms are verified.

entries.name: OpenAI Evals
entries.free_tier_evidence: Open-source harness can be used locally; any model/API calls remain blocked unless no-cost terms are documented.
entries.benchmark_path: Evaluate whether the harness improves evaluator coverage and defect detection using local/null providers first.

entries.name: Parea AI
entries.free_tier_evidence: Hosted/service free tier must be verified before benchmark.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare evaluator coverage only after free/no-cost account terms are verified.

entries.name: Opik
entries.free_tier_evidence: Open-source/local path can be benchmarked without paid SaaS dependency.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare evaluation trace/report quality against existing evidence reports.

entries.name: Custom NVIDIA eval harness
entries.free_tier_evidence: Internal/local harness is no-cost but must use benchmark datasets and calibrated metrics.
entries.benchmark_path: Run existing evaluation harness against RAG/recommendation quality fixtures.

entries.name: Phoenix
entries.free_tier_evidence: Open-source/local observability path can be benchmarked without a paid SaaS dependency.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare trace/evaluation evidence completeness against current local reports using synthetic acceptance runs.

entries.name: Langfuse
entries.free_tier_evidence: Open-source/self-hosted path can be benchmarked without paid SaaS dependency.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare trace completeness, evaluator usability, and operational evidence quality against current local reports.

entries.name: LangSmith
entries.free_tier_evidence: Hosted free/no-cost terms must be verified before benchmark.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare trace/eval quality only after no-cost account terms are verified.

entries.free_tier_evidence: Hosted free/no-cost terms must be verified before benchmark.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare evaluator and trace quality only after no-cost account terms are verified.

entries.name: Weights & Biases Weave
entries.free_tier_evidence: Free/no-cost usage and account terms must be verified before benchmark.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare trace/eval quality against current evidence reports after terms are verified.

entries.name: Helicone
entries.free_tier_evidence: Open-source/self-hosted path can be benchmarked without paid SaaS dependency.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare request observability and cost evidence against current local reports.

entries.benchmark_path: Compare evaluator and observability quality only after no-cost account terms are verified.

entries.free_tier_evidence: Hosted/free trial terms must be verified before benchmark.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare monitoring value only after no-cost terms are verified.

entries.free_tier_evidence: Free/no-cost account terms must be verified before benchmark.

entries.name: Lakera Guard

entries.name: OpenSSF Scorecard
entries.free_tier_evidence: Open-source/local CLI benchmark path can be evaluated without a paid SaaS dependency.
entries.benchmark_path: Run against repository metadata or local checkout to compare supply-chain risk signal quality against the current security/release report.

entries.name: Sigstore Cosign
entries.free_tier_evidence: Open-source/local signing and verification path can be benchmarked without a paid SaaS dependency.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare release provenance and verification evidence against current release artifact manifest.

entries.name: Renovate
entries.free_tier_evidence: Open-source/self-hosted configuration validation can be benchmarked without a paid SaaS dependency.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare dependency update signal quality, false positives, and actionable remediation detail against current manifest-only license/security inventory.

entries.name: Dependabot
entries.free_tier_evidence: GitHub-native dependency feature can be benchmarked through repository configuration without adding a paid runtime dependency.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare dependency alert/update signal quality against Renovate and current local inventory.

entries.name: Temporal activities
entries.free_tier_evidence: Local/open-source SDK workflow can be benchmarked without Temporal Cloud.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare orchestration reliability and retry evidence against current local workflow.

entries.name: A2A / Agent-to-Agent Protocol
entries.free_tier_evidence: Open protocol/spec path can be benchmarked locally without paid service.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare protocol interoperability and schema value against current tool contracts.

entries.name: AGNTCY / Agent Connect
entries.free_tier_evidence: Open-source/spec path can be benchmarked locally without paid service.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare interoperability and governance value against current tool contracts.

entries.name: Firecrawl
entries.free_tier_evidence: Open-source/self-hosted path can be benchmarked; hosted API free tier must still be verified separately.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare live sourcing coverage, provenance quality, robots/terms compliance, latency, and cost against current collectors.

entries.name: Apify
entries.free_tier_evidence: Platform free/no-cost terms and actor costs must be verified before benchmark.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare source coverage and evidence freshness against governed in-repo collectors after no-cost terms are verified.

entries.name: Label Studio
entries.free_tier_evidence: Open-source/local labeling workflow can be benchmarked without a paid SaaS dependency.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare human review throughput, schema fit, and evidence correction quality against current manual evaluator checklist.

entries.name: Argilla
entries.free_tier_evidence: Open-source/local review workflow can be benchmarked without a paid SaaS dependency.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare review quality, disagreement capture, and dataset export value against current evaluator checklist.

entries.name: Humanloop
entries.free_tier_evidence: Hosted free/no-cost terms must be verified before benchmark.
entries.benchmark_path: Compare human review and feedback workflow quality only after no-cost account terms are verified.

entries.name: Prodigy
entries.free_tier_evidence: Commercial/license terms block no-cost benchmark unless a valid free license is documented.
entries.benchmark_path: Use Label Studio/Argilla as no-cost benchmark alternatives.
